div.div: Intelligent sustainability recommendation, implementation-risk prediction, carbon-value analysis and outcome intelligence.

field.name: problem_detected
field.placeholder: Describe the ESG issue detected by EcoPulse...

field.name: implementation_steps
field.placeholder: 1. Assign owner 2. Implement action 3. Monitor progress 4. Verify results

field.name: verification_method
field.placeholder: Explain how the achieved reduction will be verified...

field.name: lessons_learned
field.placeholder: Record implementation lessons and success factors...

field.name: management_note
field.placeholder: Add approval notes and implementation decisions...

field.name: help
field.p: Create your first smart ESG action
Generate sustainability recommendations, predict implementation risks, calculate carbon value and analyze actual environmental outcomes.
